ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_types" (
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat type */,
  "seat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Marksheet, Certificate) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL where the document is stored */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_rounds" (
  "admission_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each seat type
ID of the candidate who uploaded the document
Type of the document (e.g., Marksheet, Certificate)
URL where the document is stored
Date when the document was uploaded
Unique identifier for each admission round
